name: FixSenseAnalyze
description: Send test results to FixSense for AI-powered root cause analysis and auto-fix suggestions
author: FixSense

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.label: FixSense API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your FixSense API key. Get it from [dashboard settings](https://fix-sense.com/dashboard/settings).

inputs.name: resultsPath
inputs.label: Test Results Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Glob pattern for test result files (TRX, JUnit XML). Default: `**/*.trx`

inputs.name: apiUrl
inputs.label: API URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: FixSense API endpoint (only change for self-hosted)
